item.title: [Images] Image Item
item.description: The single image generated with Midjourney commands. Either `variation` or `upscaled`.

source_url.description: The original image URL on the GoAPI server. Just for reference.

url.description: The pre-signed S3 location URL to access the image. Contains `null` by default or if `is_persisted == false`.

type.description: The type of image. Either `variation`, `separated` or `upscaled`.

is_persisted.description: Whether the image is persisted or not.

error_message.description: An error message if the image processing failed.

is_locked.description: Midjourney operations for an image are available within 1 hour after task completions as GoAPI [restricts](https://goapi.ai/docs/technical-questions#midjourney-api) it (1 hour is correct figure found in Dashboard.

timestamp.description: Required to calculate time to lock on client
